parameters.query: SELECT id FROM source_items WHERE content_hash = $1 LIMIT 1

SELECT 
  id, title, tldr, summary_bullets, deep_dive_markdown,
  topics, geo, freedom_relevance_score, credibility_score,
  citations, status, published_url, published_at, created_at, updated_at
FROM insights 
WHERE status = 'published' AND published_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 hours'
ORDER BY published_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT ON (id)
  id, title, tldr, summary_bullets, deep_dive_markdown,
  topics, geo, freedom_relevance_score, credibility_score,
  citations, status, published_url, published_at, created_at, updated_at
FROM insights 
WHERE status = 'published' AND published_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
ORDER BY id, published_at DESC

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: $('Build Tree Entries').first().json._github.commitMessage, tree: $json.sha, parents: [$('Build Tree Entries').first().json._parentCommitSha] }) }}

parameters.url: =https://api.github.com/repos/{{ $('Build Tree Entries').first().json._github.owner }}/{{ $('Build Tree Entries').first().json._github.repo }}/git/refs/heads/{{ $('Build Tree Entries').first().json._github.branch }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE source_health
SET 
  last_success_at = NOW(),
  consecutive_failures = 0,
  status = 'healthy',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE source_url = $1

parameters.query:
UPDATE user_story_items
  SET insight_generated = TRUE,
      insight_id = $1::uuid,
      processed_at = NOW()
  WHERE id = $2::uuid
